name: USB C to USB Connector Adapter USB 3.0 to USB C Converter 4-Pack USB C Male to USB 3.0 Female 2pcs,USB 3.0 Male to USB C Female 2pcs, for MacBook Pro iPad Pro and More Type C or Thunderbolt 3 Device

description: A 4-pack USB-C to USB 3.0 bidirectional adapter for connecting USB-C devices like MacBook Pro and iPad Pro to USB devices.
